markets.description: In the upcoming FIFA World Cup game between Canada and Morocco, scheduled for July 4 at 1:00 PM ET: This market will resolve to "Over" if there are 9 or more total corners taken in this game (combining corners for both teams). If the total number of corners is fewer than 9, this market will resolve to "Under". Markets on number of corners refers to number of corners taken and not corners awarded. If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50. This market refers only to corners taken within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time. Corners awarded but not taken will not count.
